title: Oritech Alternate Fluid Addon
description: Makes the fluid addon from Oritech look different
body:
## Oritech Alternate Fluid Addon (OAFA)

Makes the fluid addon from Oritech look different. The original model looked inappropriate to me and I always had to hide it somewhere, so I made this simpler model. This mod will improve the Oritech experience for sensitive people.

### FAQ
Q: Why is it a mod and not a resource pack? - A: Because it changes the hitbox too for consistency.

Q: Does the mod work client-side? - A: Yes, but it's recommended to be installed on the server too. I'm not responsible for you potentially getting kicked for flying.

Q: What loaders and versions does it support? A: 1.21.1, both NeoForge and Fabric

**Credit: Some code and assets were adapted from Oritech by Rearth**
